productDisplayName: W Women Printed Navy Blue Kurtas
description: Composition Navy blue printed kurti made of 100% cotton, has a round neckline with a short buttoned placket, elasticated seam on the bustline, short sleeves and side slits Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron This piece of art by w is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this ethnic kurti and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it when hanging out with your friends by teaming it with denims and pumps for a casual look.
